name: EcoSpark Hub
description: A full-stack community platform designed to share, discover, and vote on eco-friendly ideas.
challenges: Implementing secure JWT-based session management with Role-Based Access Control.
Integrating seamless Stripe payments for unlocking premium features.
Designing a robust modular backend architecture with TypeScript and Express.js.
Integrating Prisma ORM with Neon Serverless Postgres.
improvements: Add more comprehensive real-time analytics using Vercel Analytics.
Expand payment options and premium features.
Optimize database queries and implement advanced caching mechanisms.
detailedDescription: EcoSpark Hub is a full-stack community platform designed to share, discover, and vote on eco-friendly ideas. The frontend is built with Next.js and React 19, featuring real-time analytics, smooth animations with Framer Motion, and premium components styled with Tailwind CSS v4. The backend is powered by Node.js, Express, and TypeScript, utilizing Prisma ORM with a PostgreSQL database. It features secure JWT-based authentication, role-based access control, strict runtime HTTP validation via Zod, and seamless Stripe integration for premium features.

name: MediStore
description: A full-stack pharmacy management system built with Next.js 16, Express 5, and PostgreSQL.
challenges: Designing a scalable full-stack architecture with Next.js frontend and Express 5 backend.
Implementing secure authentication with Better Auth across client and server.
Managing type safety across the entire application using TypeScript.
improvements: Add inventory analytics dashboard with real-time reporting.
Implement role-based analytics for admin, seller, and customer.
Add automated low-stock alerts and sales tracking system.
detailedDescription: MediStore is a full-stack pharmacy management system designed to manage medicines, users, and sales operations efficiently. The frontend is built with Next.js 16 and React 19 using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS 4 for a modern UI. Radix UI ensures accessibility and reusable components. The backend is powered by Express 5 with Prisma ORM connected to PostgreSQL. Authentication is handled using Better Auth on both client and server. The project follows a modular and scalable architecture suitable for production-level applications.

name: SkillForge
description: A premium online course management platform to browse, search, and manage courses.
challenges: Implementing Firebase Authentication with persistent auth state.
Developing a dynamic course catalog with search and filtering capabilities.
improvements: Integrate payment gateway for course purchasing.
Add user progress tracking and course completion certificates.
detailedDescription: SkillForge is a premium online course management platform built with Next.js 16 and Firebase Authentication. It features a modern dark-mode UI styled with Tailwind CSS v4 and glassmorphism elements. Users can browse a comprehensive course catalog, filter by category or price, and view dynamic course details. Protected routes allow authenticated users to add and manage their courses, providing a seamless and responsive experience across all devices.

name: Urban Shelter
description: A building rent management system streamlining landlord-tenant interactions.
challenges: Implementing role-based access control for landlords and tenants.
Developing a secure and efficient rent payment system.
improvements: Integrate automated payment reminders for tenants.
Enhance the dashboard with real-time rent tracking and analytics.
detailedDescription: Urban Shelter is a comprehensive building rent management system that allows landlords to manage their properties efficiently while enabling tenants to pay rent seamlessly. The platform features a secure authentication system, an intuitive dashboard, and a responsive design for a smooth user experience across devices.

name: RentRide
description: A car rental system offering seamless booking and management.
challenges: Integrating Firebase Authentication with role-based access control.
improvements: Develop a feature to calculate and display estimated rental costs in real time.
Add support for additional payment methods and coupons.
detailedDescription: RentRide is a car rental platform that enables users to browse available cars, book them online, and manage bookings efficiently. The admin panel allows for easy car management, and the system ensures security through Firebase Authentication. Its responsive design ensures compatibility across devices.

name: Chill Gamer
description: A review platform for gamers to share and find game reviews.
improvements: Introduce a recommendation system based on user preferences.
Optimize performance for high user traffic.
detailedDescription: Chill Gamer provides a space for gamers to review and explore games. It includes a user-friendly interface, robust authentication, and moderation tools for managing reviews.

name: Discount PRO
description: A coupon collecting application to save on shopping.
challenges: Creating a dynamic dashboard for analytics.
detailedDescription: Discount PRO helps users save on their shopping by collecting and managing coupons. It features a real-time coupon tracker, analytics dashboard, and user-friendly design.
